  "findings": [
    "Troweling bleed water back into the concrete surface",
    "High risk of dusting, scaling, and low surface strength"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop finishing operations immediately",
    "Allow bleed water to evaporate naturally or remove it using a hose or squeegee without removing cement fines",
    "Do not resume troweling until all bleed water has disappeared and the concrete has set sufficiently"
  ],
  "rationale": "Troweling bleed water back into the concrete surface violates ACI 302 guidelines. It dilutes the water-cement ratio at the surface, leading to a weak, dusting, and scaling surface layer. Finishing must be halted until bleed water is gone.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 302.1R",
    "ACI 308R"
  ]
}
